task_completion.description: Access the real estate agent's tax documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer open to the taxpayer's TaxDocuments folder or a document viewer displaying tax slips.

task_completion.description: Open StudioTax 2024 to create a new return.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Taxpayer name entered in the personal information section.

task_completion.description: Complete the return by entering T4A commission income, T2125 business expenses, vehicle CCA, and other deductions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax forms and schedules are filled with numerical data including T2125 commission income.

task_completion.description: Save the return with the specified filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save dialog shows the correct .24t filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with StudioTax menus and forms, not terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show documents open from TaxDocuments folder.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered data into the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive data entry visible, not a pre-computed file.
